name: Kadami (Lebanese Roasted Chick Peas)
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup to 2-1/2 cups dry chick peas
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the dry chick peas and cover with water. Allow to soak overnight or at least 8 hours.
2. Drain the soaked chick peas.
3. Stovetop: Roast in a large skillet or home-style coffee bean roaster over medium-low heat, stirring constantly for about 25 minutes for regular-sized chick peas, or 15-20 minutes for small ones.
4. Oven: Spread in a single layer on a cookie sheet and roast at 350°F for about 30 minutes for regular-sized chick peas, or 20 minutes for small ones (cover the pan with aluminum foil for the first 3/4 of the cooking time).
5. Microwave: Place in a single layer in a microwave-safe dish and cook on high power for 2-6 minutes, depending on the size of the chick peas.
6. Variations:
- Add olive oil, garlic salt, black pepper, and chopped rosemary leaves immediately after removing from heat.
- Alternatively, add soy sauce mixed with dark sesame oil and hot chili powder or tomato juice and curry powder.
7. Store any leftovers refrigerated. These are a snack but also digestible like beans; start with small amounts if you have trouble digesting beans.
(Note: Chick peas soaked overnight at room temperature for 12-16 hours are easier to digest than those only soaked.)
